name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
This bot signs you up for Buyer Bob's free training webinar.

Tap /start, then Register — we'll ask for your name, email, and phone.
You can review or change your details anytime from My registration.

Need to stop mid-signup? Tap Cancel or send /cancel.
